Class FunctionalBlockContract

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<BlockContract>
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.FunctionalBlockContract
All Implemented Interfaces:
Contract, SpecificationElement
public class FunctionalBlockContract extends FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<BlockContract>
This class is only used to generate a proof obligation for a block (see FunctionalBlockContractPO. If a block is encountered during a proof, BlockContract is used instead.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Contract.OriginalVariables

    • map

      public FunctionalBlockContract map(UnaryOperator<JTerm> op, Services services)
      Description copied from interface: SpecificationElement
      Applies a unary operator to every term in this specification element.
      Parameters:
      op - the operator to apply.
      services - services.
      Returns:
      this specification element with the operator applied.

      Returns:
      the proof obligation

    • createProofObl

      public ProofOblInput createProofObl(InitConfig initConfig, Contract contract, boolean supportSymbolicExecutionAPI)
      Description copied from interface: Contract
      Returns a proof obligation to the passed contract and initConfig.
      Specified by:
      createProofObl in interface Contract
      Overrides:
      createProofObl in class FunctionalAuxiliaryContract<BlockContract>
      Parameters:
      initConfig - the initial configuration
      contract - the contract
      supportSymbolicExecutionAPI - boolean saying whether symbolic execution api is supported
      Returns:
      the proof obligation

    • setID

      public Contract setID(int newId)
      Description copied from interface: Contract
      Returns a contract which is identical this contract except that the id is set to the new id.
      Parameters:
      newId - the new id value
      Returns:
      an identical contract with the new id

    • setTarget

      public Contract setTarget(KeYJavaType newKJT, IObserverFunction newPM)
      Description copied from interface: Contract
      Returns a contract which is identical to this contract except that the KeYJavaType and IObserverFunction are set to the new values.
      Parameters:
      newKJT - the new KeYJavaType
      newPM - the new observer function
      Returns:
      an identical contract with the new KJT and PM (see above)
